message:
chore(audit): batches 408-410 — messaging compiler, federation, morphism, class, subject, capability, session SOUND (~12,779 lines)

Batch 408: messaging/compiler.rs (1,246L, 6 tests) — SOUND
Batch 409: federation.rs (2,584L, 62 tests), morphism.rs (2,162L, 26 tests),
  class.rs (495L, 13 tests), subject.rs (2,687L, 60 tests) — all SOUND
Batch 410: capability/{mod,routing,tokens}.rs + session/{contract,synthesis}.rs
  (4,851L, 26 tests) — SOUND. Security audit found no exploitable paths;
  all noted issues mitigated by validation or type system.

Total: 12,779 lines, 193 tests, 0 bugs.
